payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Close-up view (≈0.7 m) of a dark brown/black glossy leather recliner with a tall padded back and wide cushioned armrest; pronounced horizontal seam and visible creasing/wrinkling on the leather indicate wear; right side of the chair is cut off by the image edge (partial/edge-cropped).

message.content: {"label":"chair","short_description":"dark leather recliner, edge-cropped","long_description":"Close-up view (≈0.7 m) of a dark brown/black glossy leather recliner with a tall padded back and wide cushioned armrest; pronounced horizontal seam and visible creasing/wrinkling on the leather indicate wear; right side of the chair is cut off by the image edge (partial/edge-cropped).","attributes":["dark brown/black leather","glossy finish","padded high back","wide cushioned armrest","horizontal seam","visible creases/wrinkles","worn surface","edge-cropped/partial","close to camera"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.7}
